note: Display-only metadata for persona pool templates. Source of truth for frontend + backend. Filter specs live in backend/src/data/pool_templates.py.

pools.description: Graduate engineers, analysts, and senior professionals in metros. High disposable income, high digital literacy.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Products targeting affluent urban professionals — premium fintech, wealth management, direct-equity platforms, B2B SaaS, premium health / lifestyle subscriptions.

pools.description: Salaried workers in metros across multiple sectors. Middle-to-upper-middle income. Broader than the tech-affluent template.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Mass-premium consumer products — food delivery, fitness, upskilling, insurance, broader fintech (UPI apps, BNPL).

pools.description: Early-career workers (18–30) in tier-2 Indian cities. Graduate or senior-secondary education. Digital-native, price-conscious, aspirational.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Micro-savings, BNPL, credit-building, entry-level investing, upskilling platforms, vernacular social apps.

pools.description: Small business owners, skilled tradespeople, shopkeepers, and mid-career salaried workers in tier-2/3 cities.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: SMB tools, bookkeeping, vernacular commerce, micro-lending, supply-chain fintech, utility payments.

pools.description: Low-to-middle-income households in small cities and rural India. Informal economy workers, farmers, domestic workers, transport operators.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Micro-savings, gold savings, rural fintech, agri-tech, vernacular utility apps, remittance, insurance.

pools.description: Drivers, delivery workers, skilled trades, and manual-labor workforce in tier-1/2 cities.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Gig-worker fintech, earned-wage access, commuter-focused apps, tool-rental, skill-credentialing.

pools.description: Women 25–55 in tier-1/2 cities, primary household decision-makers. Typically married, managing groceries, children's education, family health.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Grocery delivery, kids' education apps, family health insurance, homemaker social commerce, telemedicine.

pools.description: Graduate seniors (55+) in metros with retirement savings. Health-conscious, increasingly digital.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Senior-care tech, health insurance, telemedicine, estate planning, vernacular social, hobbyist apps.

pools.description: Cultivators, farm laborers, farm overseers, and agri-adjacent workers in rural India.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Agri-tech, crop advisory, input marketplaces, farm-credit, rural insurance, FPO-tech.

pools.description: Teachers, trainers, and government administrative workers in smaller Indian cities. Stable income, high credibility within community.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Edtech for teachers, govt-scheme portals, pension/retirement products, stable-income credit products.

pools.description: Self-employed business owners, traders, dealers, and entrepreneurs in tier-1/2 cities. Revenue-generating.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: B2B SaaS, payment gateways, working-capital loans, GST/accounting tools, e-commerce enablement.

pools.description: Graduate / senior-secondary urban young adults in metros and tier-2. First-time users of credit, payments, and investment products.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: First-job fintech, student loans, UPI onboarding, early-career credit cards, entry-level investing, online learning.

pools.description: Unmarried urban young adults 22–32, metros and tier-2. Active social / dating app demographic.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Dating apps, modern social products, lifestyle subscriptions, mental-health apps, travel / experience products targeting solo users.

pools.description: Married urban adults 30–50 across tier-1/2 cities, any gender, any occupation. Primary family financial + product decision-makers.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Family health insurance, life insurance, kids' edtech, home loans, family-plan subscriptions, tax-saving products, retirement planning.
